pages.name: Scarecrow
pages.text: Health: 20  Armor: 0$(br)Damage: equipped weapon (1 unarmed)  Speed: 2.5
$(l)Behavior:$() Combat golem. Follows nearby players, roams when idle, and fights with its equipped weapon.
$(l)Hidden powers:$()$(br)$(li)$(o)Right-click it with a weapon$() to arm it; right-click empty-handed to take it back.$(li)It deals $(o)only its weapon's damage$(), so hand it your best blade.
